place_folding_board.query: a worker places a white rectangular folding board in the center of a light-purple shirt and aligns the board with both hands
place_folding_board.prompt:
Event: a worker places a white rectangular folding board in the center of a light-purple shirt and aligns the board with both hands
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

fold_shirt_around_board.query: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-purple shirt inward around a white folding board
fold_shirt_around_board.prompt:

Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
